subject: BC Detailing's invisible online presence (60-80% lost bookings?)
body:
Hey there,

I was looking at BC Detailing's digital setup and noticed something costly: customers can't book online. In 2025, that's like having a shop with no front door.

I run a dev shop here in HK that builds booking systems for service businesses. I put together a free audit of your digital presence—no fluff, just specific fixes that'd help you capture those lost bookings.

Here's your report: https://jdcoredev.com/audits/bc-detailing-hong-kong

Worth a 30-minute call to walk through it?

Josh D
Founder, JD CoreDev

P.S. You're also basically invisible on Google search right now—that's probably the second-biggest revenue leak after the booking system.

subject: Your 28K Instagram followers can't book detailing appointments online
body:
You've built an incredible brand — 102K Facebook followers, Ferraris and GT-Rs in your showroom, 30+ years of trust in Kwun Tong. But when someone with a $2M Porsche wants to book a Modesta coating after seeing your Instagram, they have to call during business hours and wait for a quote.

I just finished auditing Contempo Concept's digital setup and found you're losing detailing bookings every week because there's no way to book online. I've built AI-powered booking systems for automotive businesses that show real-time availability, auto-calculate pricing by vehicle type, and send reminders — so your team stops playing phone tag and customers book 24/7.

I put together a full breakdown of what I found and exactly how we'd fix it:
https://jdcoredev.com/audits/contempo-concept

Would you be open to a 30-minute call this week to walk through it? I think we could automate 60-70% of your current admin work while turning more of those Instagram followers into paying customers.

Josh D
Founder, JD CoreDev

P.S. — With 25+ high-value cars in inventory and no CRM tracking inquiries, you're likely losing six-figure sales that fall through the cracks. Happy to show you how we'd fix that too.

subject: J-01's 25K Instagram followers + zero Google reviews = missed revenue
body:
Hey there,

Your K11 Art Mall flagship and 25K Instagram following show you've built serious brand pull — but when I looked up J-01 on Google Maps, nothing came up. That's a lot of Tsim Sha Tsui foot traffic searching "sneakers near me" and never finding you.

I'm Josh, I build custom AI tools for Hong Kong retailers. I just put together a full audit of J-01's digital setup and spotted a massive opportunity: an AI-powered sneaker concierge that lives on WhatsApp. Customers scan a QR code in-store or DM from Instagram to check stock, reserve limited drops, and get personalized recommendations — all automated, synced live with your Shopify inventory.

I've mapped out exactly how this would work for J-01, plus three other quick wins that could turn your existing traffic into way more sales. You can see the full breakdown here:
https://jdcoredev.com/audits/j-01

Would you be open to a quick 30-min call this week to walk through it? I think there's a real play here, especially around your exclusive drops.

Josh D
JD CoreDev

P.S. — With your drop calendar and customer base, an automated segmentation system (Salomon buyers vs. New Balance collectors) + WhatsApp alerts 48 hours before releases would let you pre-sell stock before it even hits the floor. Happy to show you how that'd look.

subject: Hair House's 15K Instagram followers deserve better than a placeholder website
body:
